source_pr.title: dxf: add metrics for alert purpose in nextgen
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve? Issue Number: ref #61702 Problem Summary: ### What changed and how does it work? - 4 new series of metrics are added, 2 of which have `task_id` as labels, so they are deleted when related scheduler or executor exit - fix the issue that DXF and import-into metrics doesn't contain the global const labels(currently, only keyspace_name) - enlarge the update interval of metric related info to 15s ### Check List Tests - [x] Unit test - [ ] Integration test - [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
below are the test for related alerts

![img_v3_02ra_5a41962d-ea55-4e51-b089-7acda3f1dceg](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8171edb2-ec8a-4cf9-9eaa-f4d95940e895) ![img_v3_02ra_623fd456-1f57-44c8-94d4-a78cc579ac4g](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b827fad2-7124-446c-9044-261b9620f412) ![img_v3_02ra_85ae1525-cce8-47f1-8556-7b947bbf8beg](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fc1a07ea-4b5a-4337-a72a-589a2ef448c6) ![img_v3_02ra_f1f68fdc-c9f3-4631-bd7b-c591a9daa76g](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/714c6217-1411-4f40-9c90-dad3a6abb5b3) ![img_v3_02ra_f892ad92-51ef-423f-9a69-225d6e3fa4eg](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c874707a-f730-43f5-8d5f-a79e9f11764b) ![img_v3_02ra_0a6a8333-543f-415e-bc1b-c6a10773625g](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6a55e758-4637-4bb6-8276-357461d629c5) ![img_v3_02ra_375d18bc-cade-492b-9f73-b3e92f85b13g](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/df855eaa-140c-4f35-a65a-ce9811b11423) ![img_v3_02ra_f8ac452e-30b9-4016-b656-65792549666g](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6599a414-16f5-435b-99bb-52ebbd274024)

some metrics during import. we can see the old metrics have the `keyspace_name` label now ``` tidb_disttask_task_status{keyspace_name="SYSTEM",status="running",task_type="ImportInto"} 1 tidb_disttask_used_slots{keyspace_name="SYSTEM",service_scope="dxf_service"} 1 tidb_dxf_execute_event_total{event="subtask-slow",keyspace_name="SYSTEM",task_id="2"} 1 tidb_dxf_finished_task_total{keyspace_name="SYSTEM",state="all"} 1 tidb_dxf_finished_task_total{keyspace_name="SYSTEM",state="succeed"} 1 tidb_dxf_schedule_event_total{event="subtask-slow",keyspace_name="SYSTEM",task_id="2"} 1 tidb_dxf_schedule_event_total{event="too-many-idx",keyspace_name="SYSTEM",task_id="2"} 1 tidb_dxf_worker_count{keyspace_name="SYSTEM",type="current"} 1 tidb_dxf_worker_count{keyspace_name="SYSTEM",type="required"} 1 tidb_import_block_deliver_bytes_bucket{keyspace_name="SYSTEM",kind="data",task_id="2",le="512"} 0 tidb_import_block_deliver_bytes_bucket{keyspace_name="SYSTEM",kind="data",task_id="2",le="1024"} 0 tidb_import_block_deliver_bytes_bucket{keyspace_name="SYSTEM",kind="data",task_id="2",le="2048"} 0 tidb_import_block_deliver_bytes_bucket{keyspace_name="SYSTEM",kind="data",task_id="2",le="4096"} 0 ``` - [ ] No need to test > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed. > Side effects - [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU - [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory - [ ] Breaking backward compatibility Documentation - [ ] Affects user behaviors - [ ] Contains syntax changes - [ ] Contains variable changes - [ ] Contains experimental features - [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility ### Release note Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note. ```release-note None ```

fix_pattern: 4 new series of metrics are added, 2 of which have `task_id` as labels, so they are deleted when related scheduler or executor exit fix the issue that DXF and import-into metrics doesn't contain the global const labels(currently, only keyspace_name) enlarge the update interval of metric related info to 15s
